hero_subtitle: SFTY connects fragmented compliance data into a single operational workflow to give compliance teams clear, audit-ready visibility across customers, wallets and transactions.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow

problem_title: Compliance slows when provider outputs disconnect
problem_description: Operational workflows stall as KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, and screening data remain siloed across multiple tools. This fragmentation leaves compliance teams with fragmented risk views, duplicated reviews, and weak audit trails that complicate onboarding and ongoing customer risk monitoring.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, and screening outputs into unified customer and wallet profiles, streamlining case workflows and preserving audit evidence to speed onboarding and enhance risk visibility.
workflow_title: From provider checks to unified risk view
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates fragmented provider outputs into a connected workflow that structures customer risk profiles, routes reviews, and preserves evidence for compliance decisions.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. One risk control layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented provider outputs into structured workflows, risk decisions, case evidence and audit-ready records for a complete 360-degree customer risk view.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs building a consolidated 360-degree customer risk view with provider orchestration, audit evidence and controlled enterprise deployment from day one.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how fragmented provider checks connect to onboarding cases

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance operations?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a connected compliance layer that connects KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, screening, cases and reports for efficient, auditable digital asset compliance operations.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY connect fragmented risk profiles?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates data from multiple providers to create a 360-degree customer risk view, linking onboarding, wallets, transactions and alerts into one structured workflow for review and decisions.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case histories, decision logs and supporting evidence in a structured, audit-ready format to support internal reviews, bank due diligence and regulatory inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing provider stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing providers, connecting their outputs into cohesive workflows without requiring changes to current compliance tools or data sources.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace compliance providers or tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace underlying KYC, KYB, KYT or Travel Rule providers but organizes their outputs into controlled compliance workflows and comprehensive audit records.
final_title: Turn fragmented risk profiles into connected views
final_description: Review how SFTY connects customer, wallet and transaction data into one controlled compliance workflow for clear risk visibility.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
